name: agent-experience-graph
description: Recommend tools, skills, and workflow lessons from similar prior agent execution traces.

commands.name: recommend
commands.description: Rank similar traces and recommend reusable skills, tools, and lessons.

commands.name: append-trace
commands.description: Append or replace a sanitized trace in a JSON trace library.

codex.notes: Uses SKILL.md plus optional agents/openai.yaml UI metadata.

claude-code.notes: Uses the same SKILL.md layout and bundled scripts.

openclaw.notes: Uses the same SKILL.md layout and bundled scripts.

hermes.notes: Use SKILL.md as the instruction pack and expose scripts/recommend_traces.py as an executable helper.

generic-agent.notes: Load SKILL.md as instructions, read capability.json for metadata, and call the script with Python 3.
